2606.09548.title: Model Poisoning Against Federated Model Adaptation with Chain of Bit-Flips
2606.09548.paper_summary: Federated Learning (FL) allows a set of clients to collectively train a global model without sharing local training data. Giving the responsibility of the training to decentralized actors may lead to poisoning attacks: clients controlled by malicious third party potentially poison the training dataset to install a backdoor in neural networks. In FL, these backdoor attacks rely solely on algorithmic approach, however, recent advances in hardware faults threats (e.g, Rowhammer) have widen the overall attack surface. In the context of federated model adaptation, we introduce a novel category of backdoor attack against FL systems that relies on model poisoning based on hardware-fault attacks. More precisely, we propose a task-agnostic backdoor attack that is implanted during the FL training time by inducing hardware faults (bit-flips) in parameters of a single local model. The backdoor is crafted during a previous offline phase from the pretrained model initially used by the FL system. Our results show that a backdoor can be successfully applied on different type of models and datasets. Typically, with up to 10 faults per malicious client occurrence and 19 total occurrences on a ResNet-18 are enough to reach 94% of attack success rate. Finally, we discuss the practicality and the robustness of the attack potential defenses, while putting into perspective the practical constraints of Rowhammer, which is the preferred attack vector for this type of threats.
2606.09548.paper_summary_zh: 聯邦學習 (FL) 允許一組客戶端在不共享本地訓練數據的情況下共同訓練一個全球模型。將訓練的責任交給去中心化的參與者可能會導致中毒攻擊：由惡意第三方控制的客戶端可能會毒化訓練數據集，以在神經網絡中安裝後門。在 FL 中，這些後門攻擊僅依賴於算法方法，然而，最近在硬體故障威脅方面的進展（例如，Rowhammer）擴大了整體攻擊面。在聯邦模型適應的背景下，我們引入了一種新型的後門攻擊類別，針對基於硬體故障攻擊的 FL 系統進行模型中毒。更精確地說，我們提出了一種任務無關的後門攻擊，該攻擊在 FL 訓練期間通過在單個本地模型的參數中誘發硬體故障（位翻轉）來植入。後門是在 FL 系統最初使用的預訓練模型的先前離線階段中製作的。我們的結果顯示，後門可以成功應用於不同類型的模型和數據集。通常，每個惡意客戶端出現最多 10 次故障和在 ResNet-18 上的 19 次總出現次數足以達到 94% 的攻擊成功率。最後，我們討論了攻擊潛在防禦的實用性和穩健性，同時將 Rowhammer 的實際限制放在視野中，因為它是這類威脅的首選攻擊向量。
2606.09548.author: Bastien Vuillod et.al.
2606.09548.authors: Bastien Vuillod, Kevin Hector, Pierre-Alain Moellic, Jean-Max Dutertre, Olivier Potin
